executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: The independent-verification boundaries are now real, but the marketing full-contract loop is still genuinely red because its owner path has not yet converted repeated failing signals into a demonstrated repaired pass state.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Make the marketing owner loop produce a real repaired state and fresh passing independent verification instead of staying in measurement_pending while repo adoption remains flat and Reddit repetition remains open.

live_inventory_sources: cron tool list attempt (restricted in this runtime; removal-only)

findings.title: Marketing full-contract loop is honestly fail-closed, but still not producing a repaired pass state
findings.mechanism: The verifier boundary is now real and correctly reports fail, because the owner loop still shows flat primary-repo adoption, repeated Reddit style risk, and only measurement_pending repair states rather than demonstrated repaired outcomes.
findings.root_cause: The marketing owner path is generating diagnoses and pending measurements, but it has not yet turned those failures into fresh evidence strong enough for independent verification to pass.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep the loop fail-closed and route repair ownership back into the marketing owner loop until it produces concrete repaired evidence: distinct non-repetitive Reddit execution, measurable Codeberg movement or a tactic replacement, and a fresh passing independent-verification artifact.

findings.title: System health monitor advertises a JSON artifact but actually writes append-only JSONL to that path
findings.mechanism: self_improvement_loops.json declares agents/system/logs/health_monitor.json as the monitor artifact, but health_monitor.py appends one JSON object per line to that file. That makes the declared artifact a log stream instead of a reliable current-state document.
findings.root_cause: The monitor mixed 'latest state' and 'history log' responsibilities into one file path.
findings.recommended_fix: Split the monitor outputs into a parseable latest-state artifact (for example health_monitor_latest.json) and a separate history log (for example health_monitor.jsonl), then refresh the monitor's independent verification artifact after the change.

findings.title: Stale blocked-channel-followup residue still survives in the health monitor after the unblocker topology was collapsed
findings.mechanism: The live cron inventory and registry now show one blocked-channel owner schedule, but health_monitor.py still treats blocked-channel-followup as a key job name. The overlap was repaired in topology, yet one monitoring surface still remembers the old split.
findings.root_cause: Architecture cleanup updated cron inventory and registry notes faster than secondary monitor code.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove the stale blocked-channel-followup key-job reference from health_monitor.py and refresh the health monitor's independent verification artifact after that code change.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Drive the marketing owner loop from measurement_pending to a demonstrably repaired state
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: This is the only active full-contract loop whose independent verifier is still red.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: The marketing stack will stop reporting activity without closure and will only go green with real repaired evidence.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Separate system-health latest-state output from historical logging
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current monitor persistence is fragile and undermines its declared artifact contract.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Future monitors and audits will have one authoritative parseable health artifact plus separate history.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Delete the stale blocked-channel-followup reference from the health monitor and reverify it
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: The live topology is already collapsed; lingering stale names should not keep contaminating secondary monitors.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Cleaner topology reads and less stale-boundary confusion.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Archived the disabled temporary docs-watchdog JSON artifact so it no longer presents itself as live unhealthy authority.
Confirmed the old deep-review/follow-up overlap is no longer live: cron inventory shows only blocked-channel-deep-review, and the registry records the loop as collapsed to one owner schedule.
Confirmed that the architecture verifier is independently green and the marketing verifier is independently red for real evidence reasons rather than self-certification.

independent_verification.summary: Architecture independent verification currently passes. Marketing independent verification currently fails for substantive loop-health reasons. No same-run repair in this pass modified a repair/recovery loop in a way that required spawning a fresh verifier before closing this artifact update.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: The marketing loop is a real fail-closed contract now, but it still has not earned a pass
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: That is the clearest remaining gap between 'self-improving loop exists' and 'self-improving loop is actually recovering from its own failing signals.'
